---
title: SwissRN Computational Reproducibility Workshop
sidebar: false
date: last-modified
author:
  - name: "Fabio Molo"
    orcid: 0000-0001-9320-5854

  - name: "Daniel Stekhoven"

listing:
  type: grid
  id: main-listing
  fields: [title, subtitle]
  grid-columns: 4
  sort: false
  contents:
    - /module_1_version_control/slides/index.qmd
    - /module_1_version_control/demo/index.qmd
    - /module_2_dynamic_reporting/slides/index.qmd
    - /module_2_dynamic_reporting/demo_R/index.qmd
    - /module_2_dynamic_reporting/demo_py/index.qmd
    - /module_3_workflow_management/slides/index.qmd
    - /module_3_workflow_management/demo/index.qmd
    - /module_4_containers/slides/index.qmd
    - /module_4_containers/demo/index.qmd
    - /module_5_sharing_publishing/slides/index.qmd
    - /module_5_sharing_publishing/demo/index.qmd

toc: false
page-layout: full
---

This workshop, organized by the [Swiss Reproducibility Network](https://www.swissrn.org) introduces participants to a full reproducible research workflow.

# Modules

::: {#main-listing}
:::


---

Visit the [Requirements](instructions/index.qmd) page for software installation and setup.
